title: Craftonian Forms [Cobblemon]
description: This is an Addons inspire by ⁠Craftian Forms that will add Minecraft Themed Variants for Cobblemon
body:
This is an Addons inspire by ⁠Craftian Forms that will add Minecraft Themed Variants for Cobblemon

As of now this addon add 2 variant

- Creeper Mimikyu 👻  (Found in Cave)
- Gimmigold 🥇(Found Around Gold Block)


You Can put your suggestion for more Craftonian Forms Here! ----> ⁠https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1129855009018884178

 I will post more sneak peek on my discord channel feel free to join in! ---> https://discord.gg/NbkYPtEf4B
